title: Biome LSP Settings
description: Settings forwarded to the Biome language server under the `biome` configuration section. Biome primarily reads biome.json from the workspace; most keys here mirror that file's top-level fields.

enabled.description: Globally enables or disables Biome for this workspace.

requireConfiguration.description: When true, Biome only activates if a biome.json/biome.jsonc file is present.

formatter.description: Formatter-wide overrides. Language-specific overrides belong in biome.json.

linter.description: Linter-wide overrides. Use biome.json for per-rule configuration.
